hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>$null; exit 0
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff check "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" --output-format concise 2>$null; exit 0
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff check . 2>&1 | head -20; uv run mypy . 2>&1 | head -20; uv run pytest --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -15; exit 0
echo '[ECC] Reminder: Run /verification-loop before creating a PR'; exit 0
